message:
feat(fcp-conformance): Add mechanical connector compliance checker

Introduces automated compliance validation for FCP connectors with both
static (manifest) and dynamic (runtime) checking modes.

Static checks (StaticCompliance):
- Validates manifest ID format (alphanumeric + hyphen/underscore)
- Verifies version follows semver pattern
- Ensures at least one action is declared
- Checks each action has valid ID format

Dynamic checks (DynamicCompliance):
- Exercises handshake() method and validates protocol version support
- Calls get_health() and verifies response health state
- Tests list_actions() returns at least the manifest-declared actions
- Verifies invoke() returns valid response for valid action IDs
- Confirms invoke() returns NotFound error for unknown actions

Serializable output format allows CI integration with check IDs that
remain stable across versions for automated pass/fail reporting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
